MOTION - Notice Of Petition To Arbitrate
Off Calendar Aug-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. and RASIER-CA, LLC'S Petition To Arbitrate is granted. Plaintiffs "have no current objection to the petition to arbitrate." In any event, the parties' agreement reserves arbitrability issues for arbitrators. (Buoscio Dec. para. 13 and Ex. E; Rent-A-Center, W., Inc. v. Jackson (2010) 561 U.S. 63, 70.)

Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
